{"society_power": 7.0, "state_power": 8.5, "society_change": 0.0, "state_change": 0.5, "key_event": "WWI mobilization and Progressive administrative state expansion", "reasoning": "The state grew markedly through the income tax, Federal Reserve, regulatory agencies, and WWI mobilization/conscription, pushing it toward overwhelming capacity. Society mobilized strongly (suffrage, labor, Progressive reform) but was offset by wartime repression (Espionage/Sedition Acts, IWW suppression) and the flu pandemic, netting roughly flat."}
